subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Tusuñami-ke byambo byo twingijisha mu kifulo kya bintu. Nabiji mu kifulo kya kwamba
topics: amba Mukwemba waiya, twakonsha kunembatu amba waiya nangwa amba aye waiya.
Kyambo kya waiya “wa” ke kasuñami kaimenako Mukwemba (kintu).
